{{Quote|Make it quick. The little lady expects me home, dinner done, when she arrives. I make a mean Smuggler's Pie.|Han Solo, to Jarril|<ref name="tnr" />}}
In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]],<ref name="date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', which include the mention of Smuggler's Pie, to [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].</ref> the former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] boasted that he was to make an excellent '''Smuggler's Pie''' as [[Foodstuff/Legends|dinner]] for his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. Solo had been speaking with the smuggler [[Jarril]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Crystal Jewel]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]], and as Solo grew impatient with Jarril's meandering talk of investigating the faraway [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], he noted that he had to return to his nearby [[Chief of State's quarters|home]] and make the [[Pie/Legends|pie]]. Solo eventually returned home and tended to his wife who, to Solo's surprise, had been injured during the [[bombing of the Senate Hall]].<ref name="tnr" />

==Behind the scenes==
Smuggler's Pie was mentioned in the [[1996]] novel ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', written by [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]].<ref name="tnr" />

*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1stm}}
